/mnt/d/demo/Demotongqu/docs/Cross/toolchains/arm-rockchip830-linux-uclibcgnueabihf/bin/arm-rockchip830-linux-uclibcgnueabihf-gcc --sysroot=/mnt/d/demo/Demotongqu/docs/Cross/toolchains/arm-rockchip830-linux-uclibcgnueabihf/arm-rockchip830-linux-uclibcgnueabihf/sysroot -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libagent_sdk.so -o libagent_sdk.so CMakeFiles/agent_sdk_shared.dir/src/agent.c.o CMakeFiles/agent_sdk_shared.dir/src/device_api_client.c.o CMakeFiles/agent_sdk_shared.dir/src/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/agent_sdk_shared.dir/src/websocket.c.o  -lwebsockets -lcurl
